title: Sexual and reproductive health profiles: March 2025 update
body: "Indicators in the Sexual and reproductive health profiles have been updated with the latest data. The annual update to reproductive health indicators gives national and local data to inform planning for sexual health and contraceptive services for local populations. This includes information about inequalities such as deprivation, age and sex where this is available. These data are intended for use by local government and health service professionals.    This release updates indicators relating to:     contraceptive prescribing for 2023  hospital admissions related to fertility for the year ending March 2024    The data for contraceptive prescribing and hospital admissions related to fertility have also been revised for the previous year to account for updates to population estimates. "
